description: REJECT — preimage missing timestamp field (non-comparable, cannot satisfy anchor requirement)
notes: A preimage without timestamp produces a floating hash: it cannot be placed in time, cannot be confirmed as pre-dating the action it gates, and cannot be verified against an on-chain anchor. This is the pattern used by implementations that compute sha256(wallet || provider_id || rubric_version || days) without a time component — those hashes are non-comparable across invocations and fail the counterparty-ref-v1 spec.
